name: Kenya

assets.notes: MoneyGram MGUSD — strong MoneyGram agent presence in Kenya makes this a priority on-ramp.

bankingPartner.name: TBD — M-Pesa / Safaricom integration or licensed Kenyan bank
bankingPartner.notes: TODO (wave:medium): Research Stellar anchor precedents for KES. Existing anchors: check SDF anchor directory. M-Pesa Daraja API integration would enable mobile money settlement.

regulatoryNotes: Central Bank of Kenya (CBK) regulates forex. Lumex requires partnership with a CBK-licensed forex bureau or bank for KES settlement.
